heading: Repealed. ,Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 854, § 163631 Stat. 1434
label: 461 to 464 Repealed. ,Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 854, § 163631 Stat. 1434
notes: Section 461, , , prohibited deposit of ballast, dirt, ashes or oyster shells into Potomac River except for purpose of making a wharf and then only after approval.act May 19, 1896, ch. 208, § 129 Stat. 126
Section 462, , , prohibited deposit of dead fish, dead animals, fruits, vegetables, ice, snow, filth or trash of any kind into Potomac River.act May 19, 1896, ch. 208, § 229 Stat. 127
Section 463, , , related to penalties.act May 19, 1896, ch. 208, § 329 Stat. 127
Section 464, , , provided that none of these provisions be construed to interfere with any work or improvements in harbor or river area.act May 19, 1896, ch. 208, § 429 Stat. 127
amendments: Section 461, , , prohibited deposit of ballast, dirt, ashes or oyster shells into Potomac River except for purpose of making a wharf and then only after approval.act May 19, 1896, ch. 208, § 129 Stat. 126
Section 462, , , prohibited deposit of dead fish, dead animals, fruits, vegetables, ice, snow, filth or trash of any kind into Potomac River.act May 19, 1896, ch. 208, § 229 Stat. 127
